method: 234 real building entrances (outdoor source sector, deduped by interior) across all towns. Each of the 59 shopkeeper/clerk/save NPCs assigned to its nearest building -> service flag + function label (Shop/Inn/Service desk). Onett 6 verified by interior sign. Residences carry occupants only. TODO: EB town labels per region, and precise per-shop names (drugstore vs bakery) via interior-sign reads. TOWN LABELS from EB map_sectors.yml "Town Map Image" (authoritative): Onett/Twoson/Threed/Fourside/Summers/Scaraba; 153 buildings are in unmapped areas (Winters/Magicant/etc., no in-game minimap). UNMAPPED areas sub-grouped by sector Music id; 3 recognized in-game (Winters=music7, Moonside=music59, Dusty Dunes Desert=music45). Other unmapped clusters are visually ambiguous caves/wilderness, left Unmapped (honest). See docs/atlas/eb-grounding.md.
